examples: Contemporary accounts attest to his courage and determination.
I can attest to the absolute truth of his statement.
The fantastic achievements of modern technology and the speed at which scientific discoveries are translated into technological applications attest to the triumph of human endeavour.
Our Jetta was a Greasecar conversion, and I can attest to very little French Fry smell.
Other remains belonging to the Late Neolithic Unetice culture attest to links with populations further east.
